title: spiraea splendens var. splendens
intro: Spiraea splendens var. splendens, also known as Rose Spiraea or Spirea, is a perennial flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent properties, making it useful in treating wounds, fever, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Spiraea splendens var. splendens include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting the immune system, as well as having antioxidant and antibacterial effects. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other medicinal products.
